messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- CAT: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: Caterpillar Opens Registration for Global Innovation Challenge - PR Newswire
    Summary: Caterpillar Opens Registration for Global Innovation Challenge PR Newswire

[1] Title: Caterpillar’s Biggest Bear Folds as AI Power Demand Soars - Bloomberg.com
    Summary: Caterpillar’s Biggest Bear Folds as AI Power Demand Soars Bloomberg.com

[2] Title: A cloud computing stock is soaring more than 25%. Here’s what’s driving the rally
    Summary: Cybersecurity and cloud computing firm Akamai reported first-quarter earnings on Thursday and saw its cloud infrastructure business grow 40% year-on-year.

[3] Title: Home sales stuck at same levels from last year, says Zillow chief economist
    Summary: Orphe Divounguy, Zillow chief economist, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk the health of the housing market.

[4] Title: Tech stocks could offer their best value in years, analysts say, after stellar earnings season
    Summary: A succession of strong earnings seasons since then has allowed tech stocks to "grow into" their stock prices.

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Corporate registration announcement contains no material market information affecting CAT's growth prospects."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["CAT"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "A major bear abandoning their bearish stance on Caterpillar signals growing confidence in CAT's growth trajectory tied to AI power demand."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Akamai cloud growth news has no connection to CAT's construction/industrial business."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Housing market commentary lacks direct relevance to CAT despite indirect construction ties, as the article doesn't discuss equipment demand."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 4,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Generic tech stock valuation commentary with no specific ticker mentions and no connection to CAT's industrial growth themes."
  }
]
```
